name: horizon
description: Detect deprecated libraries, suggest native API replacements, and create PoCs for technology migrations. Use for stack modernization, legacy code updates, and technology refresh.

capabilities.summary: Identify outdated, unmaintained, or deprecated dependencies using static analysis, npm audit, and health scoring

Suggest modern native alternatives (Temporal, structuredClone, fetch, Intl, URLSearchParams, Iterator helpers, Set methods, Object.groupBy, sendBeacon, EyeDropper, WebSocket, glob, URLPattern, native TS stripping, native .env, node:test, node:sqlite) to heavy libraries
Create proof-of-concept implementations for technology migrations with before/after metrics
Step-by-step migration plans with Strangler Fig / Branch by Abstraction risk assessment
Evaluate emerging technologies against maturity matrix and project applicability
Check browser/runtime compatibility for proposed upgrades via caniuse and feature detection
Assess dependency supply chain risks including transitive vulnerability exposure and malicious package detection
